title: Corrupted .vcd file when assigning -1 to port with bitsize 1

features.name: 1-bit unpacked array port declaration [0:0]
features.description: Code should include a 1-bit port declared with unpacked array syntax using [0:0] range notation
features.snippet:
input reg[0:0] i;
output reg[0:0] o;

features.name: assignment of negative value to 1-bit signal
features.description: Code should include an assignment of -1 (signed negative integer) to a 1-bit signal causing VCD trace corruption
